name: OpenClaw
summary: OpenClaw Media Local Roots Self-Whitelisting in appendLocalMediaParentRoots Allows Model-Initiated Arbitrary Host File Read and Credential Exfiltration
description: Summary Media Local Roots Self-Whitelisting in appendLocalMediaParentRoots Allows Model-Initiated Arbitrary Host File Read and Credential Exfiltration Current Maintainer Triage - Status: narrow - Normalized severity: medium - Assessment: v2026.3.28 still self-whitelists media parent dirs in src/media/local-roots.ts, but only after config already permits tool-fs root expansion, so the impact is narrower than the default-critical framing. Affected Packages / Versions - Package: openclaw (npm) - Latest published npm version: 2026.3.31 - Vulnerable version range: <=2026.3.28 - Patched versions: >= 2026.3.31 - First stable tag containing the fix: v2026.3.31
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.3.31 or later. Commit(s) - 1ca4261d7e055d0be141ed79ebb1365d0fbc7364 — 2026-03-30T17:15:03+01:00
